queries.question: List all housekeepers and also display laundry service attendants working at The Grand Hotel.
queries.sql:
SELECT Housekeeping.housekeeper as name
FROM Housekeeping
UNION
SELECT LaundryService.laundry_attendant as name
FROM LaundryService
WHERE LaundryService.hotel = "The Grand Hotel"

queries.question: What housekeepers and laundry service attendants are employed at the Grand Hotel?
queries.sql:
SELECT Housekeeping.housekeeper as name
FROM Housekeeping
WHERE Housekeeping.hotel = "The Grand Hotel"
UNION
SELECT LaundryService.laundry_attendant as name
FROM LaundryService
WHERE LaundryService.hotel = "The Grand Hotel"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display housekeepers and laundry service attendants working at the Grand Hotel.
